subject: Unable to access patient records
description: I'm experiencing issues accessing patient records from the dashboard. The page loads but shows no data.

responses.message: Thank you for reporting this issue. We're investigating the patient records access problem and will update you shortly.

subject: Add bulk appointment scheduling
description: It would be helpful to have a feature that allows scheduling multiple appointments at once for recurring patients.

responses.message: Great suggestion! We've added this to our roadmap for the next quarter. We'll notify you when this feature is available.
